items.title_en: For publishers, pirated audiobooks made with AI on YouTube are a growing issue: removal is cumbersome, and some are hiring tech companies to take them down (Alexandra Alter/New York Times)
items.title_zh: 对于出版商来说，YouTube 上使用人工智能制作的盗版有声读物是一个日益严重的问题：删除很麻烦，有些出版商正在聘请科技公司来删除它们（Alexandra Alter/纽约时报）

items.title: I’ve tested both of Anker's new feature-packed Soundcore earbuds, which offer everything from personalized sound to Dolby Atmos to AI translation — one is clearly better, but I’d actually recommend buying the other one
items.title_original: I’ve tested both of Anker's new feature-packed Soundcore earbuds, which offer everything from personalized sound to Dolby Atmos to AI translation — one is clearly better, but I’d actually recommend buying the other one
